'''loradhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachnoidal|arachnoidal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-r-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachnoidal|arachnoidal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| loradhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:loradhithi|loradhithi]] || [[word:loradhiji|loradhiji]] || [[word:loradhishi|loradhishi]] || [[word:loradhiki|loradhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:loradhuthuthu|loradhuthuthu]] || [[word:loradhujuju|loradhujuju]] || [[word:loradhushushu|loradhushushu]] || [[word:loradhukuku|loradhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:loradhuthu|loradhuthu]] || [[word:loradhuju|loradhuju]] || [[word:loradhushu|loradhushu]] || [[word:loradhuku|loradhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:loradhufthuf|loradhufthuf]] || [[word:loradhufjuf|loradhufjuf]] || [[word:loradhufshuf|loradhufshuf]] || [[word:loradhufkuf|loradhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:loradhethe|loradhethe]] || [[word:loradheje|loradheje]] || [[word:loradheshe|loradheshe]] || [[word:loradheke|loradheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:loradhothotho|loradhothotho]] || [[word:loradhojojo|loradhojojo]] || [[word:loradhoshosho|loradhoshosho]] || [[word:loradhokoko|loradhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:loradhotho|loradhotho]] || [[word:loradhojo|loradhojo]] || [[word:loradhosho|loradhosho]] || [[word:loradhoko|loradhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:loradhofthof|loradhofthof]] || [[word:loradhofjof|loradhofjof]] || [[word:loradhofshof|loradhofshof]] || [[word:loradhofkof|loradhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:loradhïfthïf|loradhïfthïf]] || [[word:loradhïfjïf|loradhïfjïf]] || [[word:loradhïfshïf|loradhïfshïf]] || [[word:loradhïfkïf|loradhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:loradhïfthïfthïf|loradhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:loradhïfjïfjïf|loradhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:loradhïfshïfshïf|loradhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:loradhïfkïfkïf|loradhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:loradhïfthïf|loradhïfthïf]] || [[word:loradhïfjïf|loradhïfjïf]] || [[word:loradhïfshïf|loradhïfshïf]] || [[word:loradhïfkïf|loradhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:loradhïfthïf|loradhïfthïf]] || [[word:loradhïfjïf|loradhïfjïf]] || [[word:loradhïfshïf|loradhïfshïf]] || [[word:loradhïfkïf|loradhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:loradhæthæ|loradhæthæ]] || [[word:loradhæjæ|loradhæjæ]] || [[word:loradhæshæ|loradhæshæ]] || [[word:loradhækæ|loradhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:loradhathatha|loradhathatha]] || [[word:loradhajaja|loradhajaja]] || [[word:loradhashasha|loradhashasha]] || [[word:loradhakaka|loradhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:loradhatha|loradhatha]] || [[word:loradhaja|loradhaja]] || [[word:loradhasha|loradhasha]] || [[word:loradhaka|loradhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:loradhafthaf|loradhafthaf]] || [[word:loradhafjaf|loradhafjaf]] || [[word:loradhafshaf|loradhafshaf]] || [[word:loradhafkaf|loradhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:loradhasha|loradhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:loradhshësha|loradhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loradhrosha|loradhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loradhmusha|loradhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:loradhyasha|loradhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloradhnkshësha|goloradhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloradhnkrosha|goloradhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloradhnkmusha|goloradhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloradhnkyasha|goloradhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:loraradhasha|loraradhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:loraradhshësha|loraradhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loraradhrosha|loraradhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loraradhmusha|loraradhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:loraradhyasha|loraradhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloraradhnkshësha|goloraradhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloraradhnkrosha|goloraradhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloraradhnkmusha|goloraradhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloraradhnkyasha|goloraradhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lerædhasha|lerædhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lerædhshësha|lerædhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lerædhrosha|lerædhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lerædhmusha|lerædhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lerædhyasha|lerædhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golerædhnkshësha|golerædhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golerædhnkrosha|golerædhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golerædhnkmusha|golerædhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golerædhnkyasha|golerædhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lorfadhasha|lorfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lorfadhshësha|lorfadhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lorfadhrosha|lorfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lorfadhmusha|lorfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lorfadhyasha|lorfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golorfadhnkshësha|golorfadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golorfadhnkrosha|golorfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golorfadhnkmusha|golorfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golorfadhnkyasha|golorfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
